About

I'm a data professional with 2.5+ years of experience specializing in Oracle PL/SQL development and data analytics. Currently working at Mehta Multispecialty Hospital, I design and optimize high-performance ETL pipelines that process millions of healthcare records.

My expertise spans the entire data lifecycle - from writing complex PL/SQL procedures and optimizing database performance to building interactive Power BI dashboards that drive business decisions.

I'm passionate about transforming raw data into actionable insights, automating workflows, and building scalable data solutions that make a real impact in healthcare analytics.

CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE process_patient_data AS
BEGIN
-- Extract patient records
FOR rec IN (SELECT * FROM patients) LOOP
-- Clean & transform data
calculate_los(rec.admission_date);
update_data_cube(rec.patient_id);
END LOOP;
dbms_output.put_line('Processing complete');
END;
